tenant.description: Workday tenant name, substituted as a path segment into every stream's resource URL (e.g. ccx/api/hcm/v1/<tenant>/workers).

access_token.description: Workday REST API bearer access token (Authorization: Bearer <access_token>). Never logged.

base_url.description: Workday API base URL override for a tenant's actual Workday instance, tests, or proxies.
